title: VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM - 211info
text: PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM VETERANS' JUSTICE OUTREACH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The purpose of the Veterans Justice Outreach (VJO) initiative is to avoid unnecessary criminalization of mental illness and extended incarceration among veterans by ensuring that eligible veterans in contact with the criminal justice system have access to Veterans Health Administration (VHA) mental health and substance abuse services. The VJO can assess needs and identify appropriate resources, refer and link qualified veterans to appropriate services, and liaise between VA and courts, attorneys, and community partners. The VJO cannot provide legal adcice, perfom forensic psychological evaluations for the cours, accept custody of a veteran, or guarantee VA program acceptance. 3710 SW US Veterans Hospital Road Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Justice-involved veterans Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm (503) 721-1025 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-1025 Toll-free (800) 949-1004 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: DD214, Photo ID, or other identifier of service. Also helpful to have documents to support claim or need. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Diversion Programs * Veterans Mental Health Evaluation * Veterans Veteran Reintegration Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: INPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VETERAN AND MILITARY HOSPITAL MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY HOMELESS REINTEGRATION SERVICES MUTUAL SUPPORT - NATIVE AMERICAN SERVICES FOR VETERANS OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - WOMEN VETERANS HEALTH CARE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND VA MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH CARE SYSTEM
